title: Business Card QR Generator
tagline: Turn your contact details into a scannable vCard QR code.
description: Paste in your name, role, phone, email, company and website to get a QR code that pops your full contact card into the scanner's phone in one tap. Free, no signup, no watermark.

title: Email Deliverability Checker
tagline: Find out if an email address actually works before you send.
description: Validates syntax, MX records, disposable-domain checks and SMTP handshake to tell you whether an email address is real and reachable. Useful for sales, hiring, and cleaning lists.

title: Market Sizer
tagline: Quick TAM / SAM / SOM estimates from a few inputs.
description: Plug in a market, geography, and price point. Get a defensible top-down + bottom-up market sizing you can drop into a deck.

title: Competitor Pulse
tagline: Monitor competitor sites, pricing, and news in one feed.
description: Add a list of competitor URLs and we surface what changed — pricing pages, new features, leadership moves, press mentions. Daily digest by email.
